column3:
1. Log in as Admin, navigate to Hotel Info configuration page.
2. Modify Hotel Name = "Grand Plaza Hotel", Address = "123 Luxury St, New York", Contact = "0123456789", Introduction = "Welcome to Grand Plaza Hotel!", Website = "https://grandplazahotel.com".
3. Click "Save Config" button.
column4:
- Hotel details updated in DB.
- Success message displayed.
- Public website displays updated information.

System & Hotel Configuration: Update hotel info failed with missing required fields (UC-49)
column3:
1. Open Hotel Info page.
2. Clear Hotel Name and Address fields.
3. Click "Save Config".
column4:
- System prevents submission.
- Required field validation warnings are shown.
- DB remains unchanged.

System & Hotel Configuration: Update hotel info failed with invalid website URL (UC-49)
column3:
1. Open Hotel Info page.
2. Enter Website = "invalid-url-format".
3. Click "Save Config".
column4:
- Validation error displayed: "Invalid URL format!".
- DB remains unchanged.

System & Hotel Configuration: Update Google OAuth and SMTP settings successfully (UC-66)
column3:
1. Log in as Admin, navigate to System Config page.
2. Update values: Google Client ID = "client-id-123.apps.googleusercontent.com", Google Client Secret = "secret-456", SMTP Host = "smtp.gmail.com", SMTP Port = "587", SMTP Username = "hotel@gmail.com", SMTP Password = "smtp-pass-123".
3. Click "Save Configurations" button.
column4:
- System configurations updated in DB.
- Success message displayed.
- Mail and OAuth integrations use the new credentials immediately.

System & Hotel Configuration: Update system configurations failed with missing fields (UC-66)
column3:
1. Open System Config page.
2. Clear Google Client ID and SMTP Host.
3. Click "Save Configurations".
column4:
- Validation error shown for missing required fields.
- DB remains unchanged.

System & Hotel Configuration: Update system configs failed with invalid SMTP Port (UC-66)
column3:
1. Open System Config page.
2. Enter SMTP Port = "invalid_port".
3. Click "Save Configurations".
column4:
- Validation error displayed: "SMTP Port must be a number!".
- DB remains unchanged.
